ops.text:
RESULTS (compute-only, $0 LLM spend — no spawnllm/claude calls made).

MODELED: 5050 repeated judge votes over 1676 items (>=2 votes) from feedback.db triage. Raters = role×prompt_version×model (8 configs; opus dominant). is_steering flip 15.8%, category disagree 31.9%. Beta-Binomial prior alpha=0.136,beta=0.146 (U-shaped: items mostly unanimous), global mean per-item sigma_eb=0.217.

FLAGGED STRATA (permutation p<0.05, EB-shrunk sigma above global):
1. project=yclaw — sigma 0.269 (+0.052), flip 0.383, p=0.000, n=47. SURVIVES category-matching (p=0.000; within-category lift +0.04..+0.07) → genuine project-specific reliability hole, not a category-mix artifact.
2. majority_category=operational_directive — sigma 0.247 (+0.029), flip 0.292, p=0.000, n=510. The single largest actionable contested stratum.

STRUCTURAL INSIGHT: is_steering is a deterministic function of category (every category has p_steer in {0,1}); so accept/reject disagreement == category disagreement that CROSSES the steering boundary. 312 boundary-crossing confused items, dominated by:
- direction <-> operational_directive: 101
- operational_directive <-> wrong_approach: 66
operational_directive (non-steering) is the fulcrum, pulled across the line by direction/wrong_approach (steering).

RATER DECOMPOSITION: judge|opus|v6 (current prod prompt) is the MOST steering-prone rater; v4/v5 and auditor all negative (GLMM logodds v6=0, v5=-1.16, v4=-1.17, auditorV4=-2.08). Paired McNemar: opusV6 vs opusV5 86.9% agree but v6-only-steer 196 vs v5-only-steer 16 (~12:1) → v5->v6 prompt bump broadened "steering". Auditor over-calls steer 20:1 vs judge at v5. Source split: cross-prompt-version disagree 15.0%, judge-vs-auditor 20.4%.

NEGATIVE RESULTS: context-length band NOT a driver (short/med/long all ~0.21, p>0.16). mirror-vs-local surface NOT a driver (p=0.24). Cross-model judge reliability UNMEASURABLE — gpt-5.5:medium (1056 votes) and gemini (8) are SOLO judges with zero opus overlap.

HANDOFF: E19 → sharpen operational_directive vs {direction,wrong_approach} boundary + recalibrate v5->v6 threshold drift. E20 → out/top_contested.json (150 highest-sigma) + out/row_lists/*.json are the label-noise candidates.

Artifacts under ~/.cc-steer/experiments/E18-vote-cache-reliability/out/ (attached: FINDINGS.json, strata_ranked.csv, category_confusion.json, boundary_and_confound.json, rater_leniency.json).
